name: checkout_project
description: Clone a git repository into the workspace. Supports GitHub, GitLab (cloud or self-hosted), and any HTTPS/SSH remote.

name: list_projects
description: List all projects (repositories) currently checked out in the workspace.

name: remove_project
description: Remove a project from the workspace (deletes the directory).

name: git_status
description: Show the git status of a project (current branch, modified files, staged changes, etc.).

name: git_pull
description: Pull the latest changes from the remote for a project.

name: git_log
description: Show recent commit history for a project.

name: create_branch
description: Create a new git branch in a project and optionally push it to origin.

name: checkout_branch
description: Switch to an existing branch in a project.

name: list_branches
description: List local or remote branches in a project.

name: read_file
description: Read the contents of a file in a project.

name: write_file
description: Create or overwrite a file in a project.

name: list_directory
description: List the contents of a directory in a project.

name: search_files
description: Search for files matching a glob pattern in a project (node_modules and .git excluded).

name: bash
description: Execute a shell command inside the container, scoped to a project directory. Use for builds, tests, linters, package managers, etc.
